_doc: Faithful replay: a UiPath.PDF.Activities ReadPDFText on an encrypted PDF faults with UiPath.DocumentUnderstanding.Digitizer.Exceptions.PdfException 'The password is incorrect.' (from PdfReader..ctor -> ReadPDFText.GetFileReader) because no/wrong Password was supplied for the password-protected PDF. Signature captured verbatim from a live uip rpa run; workflow/process names neutralized. The agent must read the encrypted-PDF/password signature as the cause, not blame a missing file (FileNotFoundException), corrupt content (Invalid input stream), or Manage-PDF-Password argument strings. First-match-wins.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in Shared to find the failing job.
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the PdfException 'The password is incorrect.' signature.
